decisions.D-05_convergence: EXTEND-accepted (screening-grade; melt terminal relaxation incomplete — documented)

tg.note: Re-extracted from the COMPLETE 19-point staircase (700->350 K, 29.5 h wall, status=completed); supersedes the earlier partial-log (16 pts, 700->400 K) Tg=537.4 K. -4.7 K shift from full glassy-branch constraint. +114.7 K (+27.4%) vs exp 418 K is the documented single-rate (40 K/ns) cooling-rate + screening-melt over-estimate. Tg_alternative_K=500 (secondary curve_fit) disagrees by 33 K — primary F-stat Tg (R2=0.9909) is the reported value.

density.ref_note: Compared to AMORPHOUS PEEK 1.263 g/cm3 (canonical for a fully amorphous MD cell). The 1.30-1.32 figure is SEMICRYSTALLINE, not a valid comparator. Prior 1.20 ref was discredited. Value is within the loose plan gate [1.02,1.38] but ~5.5% LOW vs amorphous ref -> threads K-low caveat.

bulk_modulus.ref_note: Convention: error_pct is vs NEAREST exp bound (lower=4.0 GPa) = -11.8%; vs midpoint 5.5 GPa = -35.8%. Below 4-7 GPa range. Born infeasible -> deform fallback. Opposing biases: density -5.5% (K-low, dominant) vs fast strain rate 1e8/s (K-high). Affine K_Born=84.3 GPa = upper bound only.

convergence.verdict: EXTEND-accepted (screening-grade; melt terminal relaxation incomplete — documented)
